TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Shavkat_Mirziyoyev, title = Shavkat_Mirziyoyev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shavkat_Mirziyoyev} }

S.FORM: Shavkat Mirziyoyev ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 7, Shavkat Mirziyoyev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Uzbekistan ta' misuw hya' ga Shavkat Mirziyoyev, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Shavkat Mirziyoyev ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 7, Shavkat Mirziyoyev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1957) mrhuw Uzbekistan ta' misuw hya' ga Shavkat Mirziyoyev, aring ryax tay 14 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: s~ɕħa*kat mirzijoje* rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕħa*kat mirzijoje*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw uzβekis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕħa*kat mirzijoje*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
